---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `stevedore`
2. ...
3. See the problem

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include the on-screen error or status line if any).

## Environment

- stevedore version: `stevedore --version` or commit hash
- OS / arch:
- Docker version: `docker version`
- Terminal emulator:

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, or anything else that helps.
